channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: OpenAI Cracks 80-Year-Old Math Mystery. Why You Should Care Even If You Hate Math

media:content.media:description: What just happened in the labs of OpenAI isn't just about math.

item.description: What's next? Will machines now compete for Nobel Prizes? And why the world needs to pay attention before it gets left out in the cold.
item.content:encoded: What's next? Will machines now compete for Nobel Prizes? And why the world needs to pay attention before it gets left out in the cold.

item.title: Who Is Gabriela Gonzalez? Social Media Influencer Arrested In Murder-For-Hire Plot

media:content.media:description: Gabbie Gonzalez and her father are arrested for allegedly plotting to kill her ex, Jack Avery.

item.description: Social media influencer Gabbie Gonzalez and her father are booked over an alleged murder-for-hire scheme.
item.content:encoded: Social media influencer Gabbie Gonzalez and her father are booked over an alleged murder-for-hire scheme.

item.title: 'Collect Your Belongings And Leave': Meta's Final Email To Fired Staff

media:content.media:description: Meta Employee Laid Off: Meta called the layoffs part of its "effort to run the company more efficiently".

item.description: Meta Job Cuts: Meta employees were informed that their badges had been deactivated. Access to internal systems would be removed.
item.content:encoded: Meta Job Cuts: Meta employees were informed that their badges had been deactivated. Access to internal systems would be removed.

item.title: UK Radio Station Issues Apology After False "King Charles III Passed Away" Announcement

media:content.media:description: Buckingham Palace has not commented publicly on the incident.

item.description: The station manager explained that a computer malfunction set off the procedure "which all UK stations hold in readiness while hoping not to require."
item.content:encoded: The station manager explained that a computer malfunction set off the procedure "which all UK stations hold in readiness while hoping not to require."

item.title: 26 Years Later, Putin Meets Chinese Engineer He Once Met At Beijing Park

media:content.media:description: The meeting took place at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse.

item.description: The meeting took place at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse, where Putin stayed during his two-day visit to China.
item.content:encoded: The meeting took place at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse, where Putin stayed during his two-day visit to China.

item.title: Photographer Charged With Stealing From Bondi Shooting Victim

media:content.media:description: The alleged thief was also a photographer and pawned the gear days after lifting it.

item.description: Australian police said Thursday they had charged a man with allegedly stealing from a victim during last year's deadly mass...
item.content:encoded: Australian police said Thursday they had charged a man with allegedly stealing from a victim during last year's deadly mass...

item.title: 190 Million And Counting: Meloni's Melody Moment With PM Modi Is Mega Viral

media:content.media:description: Modi and Meloni's Melody toffee video becomes the most-watched video on her Instagram feed.

item.description: PM Narendra Modi and Girrogia Meloni's playful Melody toffee video becomes the most-watched video on her Instagram feed.
item.content:encoded: PM Narendra Modi and Girrogia Meloni's playful Melody toffee video becomes the most-watched video on her Instagram feed.

item.title: Goldman Sach CEO Slides Into Musk's DMs During Bid To Lead SpaceX IPO

media:content.media:description: The bank has had a yearslong relationship with SpaceX.

item.description: Banks have been battling for months to take the top spot on the initial public offering for SpaceX, which is targeting a valuation of more than $2 trillion while raising $75 billion.
item.content:encoded: Banks have been battling for months to take the top spot on the initial public offering for SpaceX, which is targeting a valuation of more than $2 trillion while raising $75 billion.

item.title: Sergio Gor Hints At "Big Things" In India-US Nuclear Collaboration

media:content.media:description: India's push to deepen civil nuclear ties with the US is gaining momentum

item.description: The US delegation noted that the recent enactment of the SHANTI Act, 2025, has opened up numerous opportunities for the commercial nuclear industry to work with India. Speaking
item.content:encoded: The US delegation noted that the recent enactment of the SHANTI Act, 2025, has opened up numerous opportunities for the commercial nuclear industry to work with India. Speaking

item.title: This Giant Railway Station In China Was Built On A Mountain In Just 38 Months

media:content.media:description: The station is designed to handle up to 16,000 passengers every hour during peak time.

item.description: The station is designed to handle up to 16,000 passengers every hour during peak time.
item.content:encoded: The station is designed to handle up to 16,000 passengers every hour during peak time.

item.title: "I'm Dying": New York Woman Parks Mercedes Next To Manhole, Falls Inside

media:content.media:description: Donike Gocaj was pronounced dead at a local hospital after firefighters pulled her out.

item.description: Donike Gocaj, 56, parked her Mercedes-Benz SUV right next to the maintenance hole Monday night and fell in after exiting the vehicle shortly before 11:30 pm.
item.content:encoded: Donike Gocaj, 56, parked her Mercedes-Benz SUV right next to the maintenance hole Monday night and fell in after exiting the vehicle shortly before 11:30 pm.

item.title: US Seeks Energy Export Boost To India Hit By Hormuz Blockade

media:content.media:description: Buyers queue for liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) at a depot in Noida, Uttar Pradesh.

item.description: India is a major energy importer. Before the US-Iran war, India was heavily reliant on Hormuz for supplies of about 90% LPG.
item.content:encoded: India is a major energy importer. Before the US-Iran war, India was heavily reliant on Hormuz for supplies of about 90% LPG.

item.title: SpaceX, The Sprawling Company Targeting The Stars, Mars And An IPO

media:content.media:description: SpaceX seeks to raise up to $75 billion in the stock market.

item.description: SpaceX is under contract with NASA to produce a modified variant of Starship that would serve as a human landing system.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX is under contract with NASA to produce a modified variant of Starship that would serve as a human landing system.

item.title: Trump Renews Pressure As Iran Vows Retaliation Beyond Middle East

media:content.media:description: Trump denied a Tasnim report that the US was offering oil sanctions relief as part of negotiations

item.description: US and Iran exchange threats as war tensions rise with military actions ongoing
item.content:encoded: US and Iran exchange threats as war tensions rise with military actions ongoing

item.title: Rocket, Satellite, AI Giant SpaceX Files IPO, Reveals $4.28 Billion Loss

media:content.media:description: SpaceX targets to raise as much as $75 billion through IPO.

item.description: SpaceX had a net loss of $4.28 billion on revenue of $4.69 billion for the first quarter, compared with a net loss of $528 million on revenue of about $4 billion a year earlier, the filing shows.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX had a net loss of $4.28 billion on revenue of $4.69 billion for the first quarter, compared with a net loss of $528 million on revenue of about $4 billion a year earlier, the filing shows.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Donald Trump Says Iran Talks "Right On The Borderline"

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: A Timeline Of US-Cuba Relations Amid Heightened Tensions In Trump's Second Term

media:content.media:description: Trump, in the past, has raised the possibility of a "friendly takeover of Cuba."

item.description: Trump has been escalating talk on regime change in Cuba after the military action in Venezuela early this year resulted in the capture of President Nicolas Maduro.
item.content:encoded: Trump has been escalating talk on regime change in Cuba after the military action in Venezuela early this year resulted in the capture of President Nicolas Maduro.

item.title: "No Faith, No Law, No Morality": India Slams Pak's 'Genocidal Acts' At UNSC

media:content.media:description: Parvathaneni accused Islamabad of ignoring international calls to protect civilians

item.description: The Indian envoy said that such heinous acts of aggression by Pakistan should not come as a surprise from a country that "bombs its own people and conducts systematic genocide".
item.content:encoded: The Indian envoy said that such heinous acts of aggression by Pakistan should not come as a surprise from a country that "bombs its own people and conducts systematic genocide".

item.title: Why Students Cheered Apple Co-Founder's Take On AI

media:content.media:description: Steve Wozniak, the co-founder of Apple and long-time friend and business partner of the late Steve Jobs

item.description: While several tech leaders have faced boos over AI lecturing, Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak struck a very different chord with graduating students.
item.content:encoded: While several tech leaders have faced boos over AI lecturing, Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak struck a very different chord with graduating students.

item.title: Netanyahu's 'Mistake' Warning To Trump In Hour-Long Tense Call On Iran War

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu now reportedly wants to visit Washington in the coming weeks for a meeting with Trump

item.description: Despite disagreement with Netanyahu, Trump maintained a united front in public about their Iran plan. He told reporters that Netanyahu "will do whatever I want him to do" on Iran, though he also said they had a good relationship.
item.content:encoded: Despite disagreement with Netanyahu, Trump maintained a united front in public about their Iran plan. He told reporters that Netanyahu "will do whatever I want him to do" on Iran, though he also said they had a good relationship.
